timeline.label: Peak media employment
timeline.detail: Newspapers alone employ 375K. Broadcast, print, and local media thriving.

timeline.label: Financial crisis hits
timeline.detail: Ad revenue collapses across all media. Newspapers and local stations hit hardest.

timeline.label: Digital transition begins
timeline.detail: iPad launches. Digital subscriptions start but never replace print and broadcast revenue.

timeline.label: The hollowing out
timeline.detail: Half of newspaper jobs gone. Broadcast newsrooms shrinking. Reporters down 26% in a decade.

timeline.label: COVID accelerates decline
timeline.detail: Local media loses last-resort revenue. Remote work reshapes production roles.

timeline.label: ChatGPT launches
timeline.detail: Generative AI enters every media workflow — writing, editing, design, translation.

timeline.label: 9 of 22 roles declining
timeline.detail: But 13 are growing. The story is displacement, not disappearance.
